display.purpose: Page H1 only, one per page. Clamp ceiling of 3.9rem sits deliberately under the shouting threshold.

headline.purpose: Section headings and the contact success state.

title.purpose: Sub-item headings, FAQ questions, related links. Stays serif at small sizes by rule.

body.purpose: All prose. Constrained to 65ch via max-w-prose-narrow.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked caption. Rationed to one per three sections; in Polish it reads stilted, so prefer deleting it.

shadows.name: framed-work
shadows.purpose: The only shadow in the system. Belongs to the exhibited screenshot alone, because a framed piece genuinely hangs off the wall. The -30px spread keeps the falloff wide and faint rather than tight and dark.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: The system's one curve (ease-out-quart), exposed as --ease-out. Every shell transition and entrance uses it.

motion.name: rise-in
motion.purpose: Page-hero entrance: kicker, title, sub, CTA rise 12px in sequence. Once per page load, content pages only, reduced-motion gated.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: scale(0.98) on :active for every pressable element. Feedback, not decoration; reduced-motion gated.

motion.name: settle-in
motion.purpose: Revealed content (FAQ answers, mobile menu) drops 4px into place. Reduced-motion gated.

motion.name: underline-draw
motion.purpose: Inline link underline scaling from 0 on the left. Hover-capable pointers only.

motion.name: arrow-nudge
motion.purpose: CTA arrow glyph slides 4px right on hover; the icon moves, the button never does.

motion.name: state-color
motion.purpose: Color transition for buttons, borders and focus. No lift on hover.

motion.name: work-zoom
motion.purpose: Framed work image scales to 1.02 on group hover. Reduced-motion gated.

motion.name: nav-toggle
motion.purpose: Hamburger hairlines rotating into a cross; the middle bar fades at 200ms. Reduced-motion gated.

motion.name: home-approach
motion.purpose: Homepage work frames rise 56px from 30% opacity while walking up to the pin. GSAP, matchMedia gated.

motion.name: home-unveil
motion.purpose: Clip-path wipe (direction alternates per work) + inner-image settle from 1.08 + catalogue-number parallax + two-line caption stagger.

motion.name: home-room-reveal
motion.purpose: Reveal component: section content rises 28px in 0.12 staggers. Position-driven, never toggle-fired.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The free-mockup CTA. Should look like the only real action on the page.
components.html: Odbierz darmowy projekt
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 52px; padding: 0 28px; background: #141311; color: #F7F5F0; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; border: none; border-radius: 0; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #000000; } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-icon { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF6A2C; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The email fallback beside the Instagram CTA. Used once per page at most.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 52px; padding: 0 28px; background: transparent; color: #141311; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid rgba(20,19,17,0.25); border-radius: 0; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { color: #FF6A2C; border-color: #FF6A2C; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF6A2C; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Underline Input
components.description: Label always above, never a placeholder standing in for a label. Text is larger than body copy so the field feels answerable.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; max-width: 448px; } .ds-label { display: block; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #6E6961; } .ds-required { color: #FF6A2C; } .ds-input { margin-top: 4px; height: 52px; width: 100%; padding: 0; background: transparent; color: #141311; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(20,19,17,0.25); border-radius: 0; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(110,105,97,0.5); } .ds-input:focus { border-bottom-color: #FF6A2C; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sits in flow with a hairline under-border on content pages; floats transparently over the cover on the homepage.
components.html:
Sitelab
OfertaRealizacjeCennikKontakt
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 32px; min-height: 44px; padding: 20px 40px; background: #F7F5F0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(20,19,17,0.12); } .ds-nav-logo { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Gambetta, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #141311; } .ds-nav-dot { display: inline-block; width: 5px; height: 5px; margin-left: 3px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #FF6A2C; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #141311; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -2px; height: 1px; background: #FF6A2C; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 450ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background: #141311; color: #F7F5F0; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #000000; } .ds-nav-cta:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Placard
components.description: The offer as a museum label. Capped at label size so it never grows into a pricing comparison table, which is a named anti-reference.
components.html:
Projekt
Darmowy
Gotowa strona
399 zł
Czas
72 h

Płacisz dopiero, kiedy projekt Ci się spodoba.
components.css: .ds-placard { max-width: 448px; padding: 28px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(20,19,17,0.12); border-radius: 0; } .ds-placard-list { margin: 0; } .ds-placard-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 12px 0; } .ds-placard-row-sep { border-top: 1px solid rgba(20,19,17,0.12); } .ds-placard-label { font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6E6961; } .ds-placard-value { margin: 0; font-family: Gambetta, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #141311; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-placard-note { margin: 20px 0 0; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; color: #6E6961; }

components.name: FAQ Row
components.description: Native details/summary, so it is accessible and needs no client JS. The plus rotates to a cross on open.
components.html:
Ile trwa przygotowanie strony?+

Projekt strony głównej dostajesz w 24 godziny. Gotowa strona jest online w 72 godziny od akceptacji.
components.css: .ds-faq { max-width: 65ch; padding: 20px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(20,19,17,0.12); } .ds-faq-q { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; cursor: pointer; list-style: none; font-family: Gambetta, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #141311; } .ds-faq-q::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-faq-mark { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1; color: #FF6A2C; transition: transform 300ms ease; } .ds-faq[open] .ds-faq-mark { transform: rotate(45deg); } .ds-faq-a { margin: 12px 0 0; max-width: 65ch; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.625; color: #6E6961; }

components.name: Section Caption
components.description: Rationed to one per three sections. Rendered here so the ration is visible, not so it is convenient to reach for.
components.css: .ds-caption { margin: 0; font-family: Satoshi, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #6E6961; } .ds-caption::after { content: ""; display: inline-block; width: 5px; height: 5px; margin-left: 8px; vertical-align: middle; border-radius: 9999px; background: #FF6A2C; }

narrative.overview:
A gallery that is also a workshop. The walls are ivory, the labels are factual, the hanging is generous, and the work on show is honestly unsold. This distinction matters more than it sounds: a finished gallery implies a career behind it, and there is not one yet. A working gallery implies a practice in motion, which is true and which is the only claim this site is entitled to make.

The system is built so the shell recedes and the exhibited screenshots carry every saturated color on the page. The ivory, the ink, the stone grey and the hairlines are deliberately inert. When a cafe's magenta or a bakery's deep green appears inside a framed work image, it should be the loudest thing on screen by a wide margin. Any decoration added to the shell steals from that contrast, so the shell gets nothing it does not need.

Restraint here is an argument, not a preference. PRODUCT.md is explicit that there are no clients and no testimonials, so the craft of the page a visitor is currently reading is the only evidence available. The system therefore rejects two things by name: the Wix and template-marketplace look, because resembling the product being sold against is self-defeating, and the default SaaS startup landing page, because its dark hero, gradient text, three equal feature cards and "Trusted by" logo wall would all be borrowed credibility this studio has not earned.
keyCharacteristics: Ivory walls, ink text, stone secondary copy, one warm accent
Sharp corners everywhere; radius exists only for dots and status circles
Hairline rules at 12% ink do the structural work that borders and cards do elsewhere
Editorial serif display against a quiet geometric sans body
Motion is scroll-driven on the homepage and absent on content pages, by design
A single deliberate light composition, with dark mode explicitly refused

rules.name: The Loudest Thing Rule
rules.body: The most saturated color on any screen must belong to an exhibited work, never to the shell. If a shell element is competing with the artwork for attention, the shell element is wrong.

rules.name: The Five Places Rule
rules.body: Kiln Orange is permitted in exactly five roles: logo dot, focus ring, link underline, expand marker, required marker. Adding a sixth requires removing one. It is never a button fill, never a section background, never a gradient.

rules.name: The Committed Light Rule
rules.body: This is a single deliberate light composition. color-scheme: only light is load-bearing and opts the site out of Chrome and Android auto-dark inversion, which would destroy the ivory. Dark mode is refused, not forgotten. Do not add it.

rules.name: The Rationed Caption Rule
rules.body: The uppercase tracked caption is capped at one per three sections, counting the page hero as one. In Polish the small-caps museum-label register reads stilted where it reads natural in English, so a surviving caption should be a short noun rather than a sentence fragment. A caption above every section also produces the templated rhythm that marks a page as machine-made. The default when unsure is to delete it.

rules.name: The Serif Everywhere Rule
rules.body: Gambetta carries headings at every size, down to 1.125rem. Do not switch small headings to Satoshi for clarity; the serif at small sizes is what makes a dense content page feel edited rather than generated.

rules.name: The One Shadow Rule
rules.body: The system has a single shadow and it is spoken for. Buttons, cards, navigation, dropdowns, the Placard and form fields are all flat, at rest and on hover. A second shadow entering this system is a defect, not an addition.

rules.name: The Tonal Separation Rule
rules.body: When an element needs to separate from the wall, change its tone or draw a hairline around it. Never lift it. If it looks like a 2014 app, a shadow was used where a hairline belonged.

dos: Do let exhibited work be the loudest color on any screen. The shell is inert on purpose.
Do keep every corner sharp (0px). Radius exists only for the logo dot and the success circle.
Do draw structure with 1px hairlines at 12% ink instead of reaching for borders, boxes or cards.
Do keep body copy inside 65ch using max-w-prose-narrow.
Do keep --stone at #6E6961 or darker. It is a contrast floor, tuned to clear 4.5:1 on ivory.
Do gate every animation behind gsap.matchMedia so reduced-motion visitors get a fully static page rather than a broken one.
Do keep color-scheme: only light. It prevents Android and Chrome auto-dark from inverting the ivory.
Do write section captions as short nouns when one survives the ration, and prefer deleting it.
donts: Don't put a caption above every section. The cap is one per three sections including the hero. This is the most violated rule in this system, and in Polish the small-caps register reads stilted where it reads natural in English.
Don't add a second shadow. The framed work image owns the only one.
Don't build anything resembling a Wix or template marketplace: no grids of theme thumbnails, no wybierz szablon, no checkmark comparison columns.
Don't build anything resembling the default SaaS startup landing page: no dark hero, no gradient text, no three equal feature cards, no fake dashboard screenshot, no Trusted by logo wall.
Don't ship a testimonial, a client logo, a client count, or a review. There are none.
Don't invent precise-sounding numbers that no real data supports.
Don't use an em-dash anywhere in visible copy. Regular hyphens only.
Don't add dark mode. The single light composition is a decision, not an omission.
Don't use Kiln Orange as a button fill, a section background, or a gradient. Five roles, no sixth.
Don't lift anything on hover. Color transitions only, no translate, no scale, no shadow.
